message:
fix(jira): guard status transition against None bead status

Replace unwrap() with if-let pattern when extracting target_status
from bead.status in both the update and create sync paths. Previously,
status_transition_required was called with bead.status directly, but
the unwrap() on the next line would panic if bead.status was None.
Now the transition is only attempted when a target status is present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
